theme_archetype.reasoning: Aasha means 'Hope'. We avoid the cold, clinical feel of standard chat apps and use a warm, optimistic palette (cream, sunrise orange) with soft typography to create a safe, inviting, and human-centric space.

headings.usage: Auth screens, empty states, profile names, group names.

body.usage: Chat bubbles, lists, timestamps, standard UI text. Chosen for high legibility and friendly rounded geometry.

grid.desktop: grid-cols-[320px_1fr] or grid-cols-[360px_1fr] for large screens

component_rules.buttons: Shadcn Button heavily customized. Primary uses sunrise orange. Pill-shaped (rounded-full) for primary actions. Use smooth shadow on hover.
component_rules.cards: File/Media attachments inside chat must have rounded-xl borders, subtle 1px border (#E6E3DB), no heavy drop shadows. Go flat.
component_rules.dialogs: Use Shadcn Dialog for New Chat, Group Creation, Settings. Backdrop blur is mandatory (backdrop-blur-sm bg-black/30). Dialog surface is #FCFBF8.
component_rules.dropdowns: Shadcn DropdownMenu for message actions (Forward, Share, Delete). Keep animations snappy.
component_rules.avatars: Shadcn Avatar. Always circle. Online indicator is a 12px circle with a 2px white border positioned at bottom-right.
component_rules.icons: lucide-react. Stroke width 2px for clarity. Use standard icons: Paperclip, Send, Mic, Image, FileText, MapPin, MoreVertical.
component_rules.inputs: Shadcn Input. Strip away standard focus rings. Use subtle background (#FFFFFF) with 1px border. On focus, change border to #F26C4F.

motion_interactions.page_transitions: Framer Motion. Fade and slight slide-up (y: 10 -> 0, opacity 0 -> 1, duration: 0.3s).
motion_interactions.chat_bubbles: Scale in from the origin corner. Sent (origin-bottom-right), Received (origin-bottom-left). Spring animation for organic bounciness.
motion_interactions.hover_states: Sidebar items should have a soft background transition (bg-transparent to bg-white) with scale 0.98 on tap.
motion_interactions.menus: Context menus should use scale and opacity fade-in.

auth_background.description: Warm sunrise sky over ocean. Use as a blurred or soft background overlay for the Login/Signup screen.
Abstract swirling sunrise clouds. Good for splash screen or loading states.

onboarding_images.description: Friendly woman texting. Use in onboarding carousel.

empty_states.description: Empty sunlit hallway. Use as a soft background or visual for 'No chats selected'.

testing_guidelines.attributes: All interactive elements MUST use data-testid. Examples: data-testid='chat-list-item', data-testid='message-input', data-testid='send-button', data-testid='attach-file-button'.

specific_feature_guidelines.file_attachments: Display files (PDF, DOC, ZIP) as distinct horizontal cards within the chat bubble. Left icon (document type), center filename/size, right download icon. Max width constraint.
specific_feature_guidelines.media_grid: When sending multiple images, use a bento-box style grid. 2 images: side-by-side. 3 images: 1 large on top, 2 small on bottom.
specific_feature_guidelines.links: Auto-detect links and render a preview card with a grey/white background inside the bubble, showing the title, description, and domain.
specific_feature_guidelines.location: Render location pins as small map snapshot cards. Left side has a MapPin icon on a muted background, right side shows 'Location Shared' with Lat/Lng or generic address.
specific_feature_guidelines.chat_list: Unread badges should use the primary color (#F26C4F) with white text. Avatars of groups should use a 2x2 grid of participant avatars if image is missing.
